mapper.select:
SELECT v.id, v.creator_id, v.url, v.description, v.likes, v.comments, v.favorites,
IF(vul.user_id IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
0
AS is_like,
IF(vuf.user_id IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
0
AS is_favorite FROM video v
LEFT JOIN video_user_like vul ON ( v.id = vul.video_id AND vul.user_id = #{userId} AND vul.status = 'FRONT' ) LEFT JOIN video_user_favorite vuf ON ( v.id = vuf.video_id AND vuf.user_id = #{userId} AND vuf.status = 'FRONT' )
WHERE v.id >= ( SELECT MIN(id) + FLOOR(RAND() * (MAX(id) - MIN(id))) FROM video ) LIMIT 5
